sentences.english: I cook a big meal every Sunday for my family.
sentences.korean: 매주 일요일 가족을 위해 큰 식사를 만들어요.

sentences.english: It's our tradition and everyone comes over.
I meal prep on Sundays for the whole week, which saves me so much time during busy weekdays.
sentences.korean: 일요일에 일주일치 식사를 미리 준비해요. 바쁜 평일에 시간이 많이 절약돼요.

sentences.english: I only cook on weekends because I'm too tired after work, and during the week I just eat takeout.
sentences.korean: 퇴근 후 너무 피곤해서 주말에만 요리하고 주중에는 포장 음식만 먹어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
